integration_args.subject: Recruiter DAG migration audit progress
integration_args.body: Audit complete for lead-discovery, lead-scoring, company-intel, and opportunity-review. Progress: generic DAG seams exist for workflow.invoke, dag-workflow.dispatch_job, dag-workflow.check_status, and notifications.send. Blockers: recruiter/search_leads, recruiter/score_leads, recruiter/company_intel, and recruiter/review_opportunities do not exist as runtime authorities; dag-workflow/search_receipts currently matches spec_name rather than actual receipt evidence; workflow invocation requires workflowId-backed wiring to stay on the integration path. Live DAG evidence at 2026-04-08T00:11Z: dispatch_34b4ce54ac85 is still running with ps_mnpacbst_1 succeeded and ps_mnpacbst_2 running; the audit notification path already executed successfully as dispatch_b72059742e65 via integration/notifications. No completed Recruiter-plan receipts were returned by dag_receipt_search during this audit window.
